description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 5th; Slot eye; Price 8,500 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION These simple goggles, made of two emeralds attached to a twin frame, grant the wearer low-light vision and a +5 compentence bonus on Spellcraft checks to identify magic auras and items. If the wearer already has low-light vision, it grants the wearer double the normal range for low-light vision. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, beast shape II, guidance; Cost 4,250 gp.
